overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade at dusk, transitioning into a neon-lit commercial district with digital billboards and outdoor cafes. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and vibrant neon signage reflecting off wet pavement.

events.description: characters begin walking forward along the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: character in black top and red pants standing at the waterfront railing looking at the cityscape across the water

notable_agents.action: companion character in orange top and purple pants standing and looking at the water

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with multiple tiers visible across the water
metal railing along the water's edge with reflective surface below
dark water reflecting the city lights and tower illumination
elevated highway or monorail track spanning horizontally across the scene
large dark industrial structure with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a waterfront overlook at dusk, with a towering futuristic skyscraper dominating the skyline across the water. The camera circles around two characters standing at a metal railing, looking out at the illuminated cityscape. The sky is clear with fading natural light, and an elevated highway structure spans the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and industrial buildings

events.description: transitioning from open waterfront overlook to tree-lined commercial promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade alongside the companion character

notable_agents.action: companion character in orange top walking ahead along the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
building facade illuminated with purple and cyan neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The characters begin walking along the concrete waterfront promenade, moving away from the open overlook into a tree-lined section. Palm trees appear on the left while industrial buildings and neon-lit structures become visible ahead. The metal railing continues along the right side, and the elevated highway structure shifts toward the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial promenade with large digital billboards

events.description: entering area with large illuminated advertisements and digital billboards on building walls

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated billboards and benches along the commercial walkway

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing promotional content with purple and yellow colors and text
yellow public benches positioned along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The promenade transitions to a more commercial area with large digital billboards mounted on building walls. The waterfront railing and water disappear from view as the path moves inland. Yellow benches line the left side of the walkway, and palm trees become more prominent in the mid-ground. The lighting shifts to include more artificial sources from the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with outdoor cafes and Nicola brand advertisements

events.description: entering covered commercial corridor with outdoor seating and prominent Nicola soda branding
lighting becomes dominated by purple and pink neon from storefronts and signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow commercial corridor with outdoor dining areas and bright neon signage

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at outdoor table under white umbrella
person standing near teal vending machine

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for Nicola soda with 'TASTE THE LOVE' slogan in pink and white
white umbrellas over outdoor dining tables with checkered floor pattern
teal colored vending machine with glowing neon accents
blue and yellow checkered tile pattern on ground near seating area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered commercial walkway lined with outdoor cafes under white umbrellas. Large Nicola brand signage dominates the left wall, while purple and pink neon lights illuminate the storefronts. The corridor feels more enclosed with the sky mostly blocked by overhead structures. Pedestrians sit at outdoor tables, and a vending machine glows with teal lighting near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open waterfront overlook at dusk into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins by circling two characters at a metal railing, framing a towering futuristic skyscraper and an elevated highway against a fading natural sky. As the characters begin walking, the scene shifts from the open vista to a tree-lined promenade where palm trees and industrial buildings emerge alongside the continuing railing. The path then moves inland, causing the waterfront to disappear as the lighting transitions from twilight to the artificial glow of large digital billboards and yellow benches. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera enters a covered walkway filled with outdoor cafes under white umbrellas, dominated by purple and pink neon signage and glowing teal vending machines.
